subjects.description: colorful butterflies moving through a sunlit garden
subjects.appearance_details: orange, blue, black, yellow, and white patterned wings, delicate bodies, thin antennae, and shimmering wing surfaces in sunlight
subjects.relationship: main moving subjects attracted to the flowers
subjects.location: foreground and midground above blooming flowers, shrubs, paths, and a small pond
subjects.relative_size: small insects, visually prominent through close camera framing
subjects.orientation: flying in varied directions, landing on blossoms, then lifting off again
subjects.pose: wings opening, closing, hovering, and resting on petals
subjects.action: flit from flower to flower, hover briefly, land, feed, and take off in graceful arcs
subjects.state_changes: butterflies enter frame; several land on blossoms; wings catch stronger sunlight before lifting off
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: fine wing scales, tiny bodies, delicate legs, and translucent sunlit edges
subjects.facial_features: tiny antennae, compound eyes, and small proboscis details

subjects.description: vibrant flower garden with roses, daisies, orchids, and water lilies
subjects.appearance_details: delicate roses, cheerful daisies, exotic orchids, flowering shrubs, winding paths, a small pond, floating water lilies, and layered green leaves
subjects.relationship: lush habitat and visual stage for butterfly movement
subjects.location: entire garden setting from foreground beds to background paths and pond
subjects.orientation: flower beds curve along winding paths and pond edges
subjects.pose: blooming and gently swaying in the breeze
subjects.action: sways, releases implied fragrance, reflects light on pond water, and supports butterfly landings
subjects.state_changes: flowers sway as breeze passes; pond ripples lightly; butterfly landings animate blossoms
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft petals, glossy leaves, wet lily pads, rough path stones, and shimmering pond water

background_setting: A carefully designed garden with winding paths, flowering shrubs, roses, daisies, orchids, a small pond with water lilies, dense greenery, and many butterflies moving through warm scented air.

lighting.conditions: Bright sun filtered by garden foliage, with warm highlights on wings and petals, soft shadows along paths, and sparkling reflections on the pond.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright sun filtered by garden foliage, with warm highlights on wings and petals, soft shadows along paths, and sparkling reflections on the pond.

aesthetics.composition: Lush floral color, graceful insect movement, fragrant garden calm, elegant paths, pond reflections, and a lively harmony of nature.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Lush floral color, graceful insect movement, fragrant garden calm, elegant paths, pond reflections, and a lively harmony of nature.

cinematography.camera_motion: Macro-to-medium garden shot with shallow depth of field, smooth tracking across flowers, and brief close focus on butterfly wings shimmering in sunlight.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Cinematic botanical realism with vivid color, gentle motion, and delicate macro detail.
context: In a sunlit garden full of roses, daisies, orchids, and water lilies, butterflies drift among the blossoms and bring the scene alive with color and motion.

actions.description: The camera reveals a lush garden of bright flowers, winding paths, and butterflies beginning to cross the frame.
Butterflies hover and land on roses, daisies, and orchids while petals sway and pond water ripples nearby.
A close butterfly opens its patterned wings in sunlight before lifting off toward the water lilies.

segments.description: Establish the vibrant garden with flowers, paths, pond, and the first butterflies moving through warm light.
segments.key_changes: Butterflies enter and draw focus from the garden layout to floral detail.
segments.camera: Medium garden glide with shallow depth of field.

segments.description: Follow butterflies as they flit between roses, daisies, orchids, shrubs, and water lilies.
segments.key_changes: Wing colors shimmer, blossoms move under landings, and pond reflections ripple.
segments.camera: Smooth macro tracking shot weaving between flowers.

segments.description: Hold on a butterfly opening its wings, then lifting away into the luminous garden.
segments.key_changes: Close wing detail catches sunlight and motion shifts from resting to flight.
segments.camera: Macro close-up with rack focus from wing texture to background blooms.

temporal_caption: Colorful butterflies drift through a sunlit garden of roses, daisies, orchids, paths, and water lilies.
audio_description: Soft breeze through leaves, faint wing flutter, bees and insects, light water ripples, and quiet garden ambience.
